schema_version.description: Schema version. v1 only; future versions are rejected so older code fails closed against newer configs (a forward-compat upgrade requires a new code release that recognizes the new const).

completed_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when migrate.py --apply completed against this repo. Sole writer is migrate.py itself; SKILL.md wrappers must never set this independently.

from_layout.description: Originating layout that was migrated. Only known historical value is 'docs+tdd' (the pre-workflow-cleanup layout); null means no migration has occurred.

offered_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when first-run preflight last offered to set up branch protection. Used to suppress repeated prompts.

applied_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when branch protection was successfully applied via gh api.

declined.description: True if user explicitly declined branch protection setup. Suppresses future prompts permanently until manually flipped.

profile.description: Named protection profile applied. Only known value today is 'team-pr-1approval-noforce' (PR required, 1 approval, no force-push).

pdw.description: parallel-design-worktrees configuration: loop guards, URL allowlist for fix-comments, and runner backend selector.

diff_growth_multiplier.description: Multiplier vs. original_diff_lines at which the loop transitions convergence-failure. Default 3.

k_consecutive.description: Number of consecutive structural-present rounds that triggers convergence-failure. Default 3.

idle_timeout_sec.description: Seconds with no new comments after a non-structural verdict before transitioning to awaiting-human-review. Default 1800.

comment_url_allowlist.description: Additional URL netlocs allowed in fix-comment bodies beyond github.com and the repo origin host.

type.description: Runner backend identifier. v1 supports 'claude' only — `run_supervisor._wrap_slash` raises NotImplementedError on any other value, so the schema fails the misconfig at validation time rather than at runtime. The `local-run-auto-sessions` design will broaden this enum.
